name: SHARING ECONOMY INTERNATIONAL INC.
business: Sharing Economy International Inc. operates an online rental classified platform, ECrent.com, that connects individuals and businesses to list and search for rental products and services. The company derives revenue from fees charged to the supply side for posting items or services, including a monthly fee for unlimited postings and an annual fee for microsites. It also provides rental services on rare tools/items and venue locations in Hong Kong.

exposures.sentence: Our business focuses on the development of sharing economy platforms and related rental businesses.

tamClaims.claim: The global sharing and rental market would generate a potential revenue opportunity worth a total of $670 billion by 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Based on the PwC research, the global sharing and rental market would generate a potential revenue opportunity worth a total of $670 billion by 2025.
